reviews.comment:
No saben utilizar la aplicación YPF . No me hicieron el descuento. Les tuve que dejar mi contacto, quizá lo realizan luego.

(Translated by Google)
They don't know how to use the YPF app. They didn't give me the discount. I had to leave them my contact information; maybe they'll do it later.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8137682330194139512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhcXBXRGtBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Dolo cargue combustible.  No tenían refrigerante  organico

(Translated by Google)
I only refueled. They didn't have organic coolant.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8137682330194139512/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhb3FfeFd3EAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Están atentos si tenes serviclub para cargarte los puntos u ofrecerte un descuento. Muy Limpia y prolija toda la estación. Todo funcionando. Una de las dársenas es para calibrar el aire de los neumáticos con la manguera que viene de arriba así que es comodisimo.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. They're attentive to Serviclub membership, helping you add points or offering discounts. The entire station is very clean and tidy. Everything is working. One of the bays is for checking tire pressure with the hose that comes from above, so it's very convenient.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8137682330194139512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhb3IyWjhRRRAB
